nasb.text: When Leah saw that she had stopped bearing, she took her maid Zilpah and gave her to Jacob as a wife.

esv.text: When Leah saw that she had ceased bearing children, she took her servant Zilpah and gave her to Jacob as a wife.

cnv.text: 利亞見自己停止生育，就把她的婢女悉帕給了雅各為妾。

ccb.text: 利亚见自己不再生育，就把婢女悉帕给雅各做妾。

csbs.text: 莉亚见自己停止了生育，就把自己的婢女悉帕带来给雅各作妾。
